Title: EPIC: Project setup and deployment foundation
Body: Create repo/app foundation for the Capital Health Solutions prototype under Corvo Labs hosting.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: Next.js app created, routes run locally, deploy target documented, README includes local setup and deployment instructions.

Title: Set up Next.js project for /capitalhealthsolutions route
Body: Create Next.js app or monorepo route that supports hosting under corvolabs.com/capitalhealthsolutions.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: homepage renders at /capitalhealthsolutions locally and supports nested routes.

Title: Configure deployment on Vercel or Cloudflare Pages
Body: Deploy review prototype to public URL under Corvo Labs domain.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: public preview URL works, custom path/domain plan documented.

Title: Add environment variable strategy
Body: Document required env vars for HubSpot, Twilio, AssemblyAI, Google Calendar, Trigger.dev, analytics.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: .env.example created with no secrets committed.

Title: Create site-wide design tokens from option 02
Body: Translate option 02 colors, fonts, spacing, and component patterns into reusable Tailwind/theme config.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: design tokens include midnight navy, glacier gray, burgundy, steel blue, typography, spacing.

Title: Build shared layout and navigation
Body: Create reusable nav/footer based on option 02, with routes for Services, Devices, Resources, Support, Proposal, Contact.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: nav is responsive, sticky, and links to implemented pages.

Title: Adapt homepage option 02 into production component
Body: Use selected prototype direction but replace placeholder content and unsupported claims.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: homepage uses accurate CHS positioning, no fake names/claims, has consultation/SMS CTAs.

Title: Create interactive proposal page
Body: Build /proposal page with sections for strategy, automation, SMS, voice, HubSpot, website, roadmap, costs, issues.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: page is polished, navigable, and can be shared with Milan/Dinesh.

Title: Create devices hub page
Body: Build /devices hub for equipment categories and multi-brand positioning with Mindray emphasis.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: includes category cards, CTA, internal links to details.

Title: Create device detail template
Body: Build reusable device detail page template with specs, use cases, FAQs, CTA, schema support.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: page supports model name, practice fit, feature table, FAQs, related articles.

Title: Create solutions hub page
Body: Build /solutions page for practice segments and clinical workflows.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: links to vein clinics and vascular surgery group pages.

Title: Create vein clinics solution page
Body: Build primary segment page for multi-provider vein clinics.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: page speaks to growth, training, support, config, workflow and CTA.

Title: Create vascular surgery groups solution page
Body: Build primary segment page for vascular surgery groups.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: page speaks to imaging quality, multi-provider workflows, training, device fit.

Title: Create training page
Body: Build page for onboarding, hands-on training, technician support, and staff confidence.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: includes training journey, scheduling CTA, FAQs.

Title: Create support page
Body: Build support hub with SMS/phone CTA, PHI warning, expected hours, escalation description.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: includes 415-VEINS-R-US placeholder, same-day business-hours expectation, safe SMS guidance.

Title: Create resources hub
Body: Build content hub with pillars, featured articles, filters, and internal linking.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: first 4 articles are listed and linked.

Title: Publish article 1: Buyer’s guide
Body: Write and publish ultimate buyer’s guide article.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: complete article, answer blocks, FAQ section, internal links, metadata.

Title: Publish article 2: Portable vs console
Body: Write and publish comparison article.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: complete article, comparison table, CTAs, FAQs.

Title: Publish article 3: DVT setup
Body: Write and publish DVT setup article with safety boundaries.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: complete article, technical workflow not medical interpretation, FAQs.

Title: Publish article 4: Venous insufficiency mapping
Body: Write and publish venous insufficiency workflow article with safe framing.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: complete article, protocol/workflow framing, FAQs.

Title: Create case studies hub
Body: Create hub for representative case studies with placeholders clearly marked.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: no unsupported claims; case study templates ready.

Title: Create conference landing page
Body: Build /conference page for Dinesh/Milan event lead capture and SMS CTA.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: form, QR-friendly layout, SMS deep link, source selection.

Title: Create contact/consultation page
Body: Build consultation page optimized for phone, SMS, and form conversion.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: supports phone/SMS CTA and form submission path.

Title: Implement structured metadata
Body: Add SEO titles, descriptions, OG tags, and canonical URLs for all pages.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: every page has metadata and canonical.

Title: Add JSON-LD Organization and LocalBusiness schema
Body: Implement base schema for CHS.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: schema validates with rich results/schema validator.

Title: Add Product schema to device pages
Body: Add schema-ready product information for device detail pages.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: product schema generated from page data.

Title: Add Article schema to resources
Body: Add schema to article pages.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: article schema validates.

Title: Add FAQ schema blocks
Body: Implement reusable FAQ component with JSON-LD output.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: FAQ schema on articles, support, training, device pages.

Title: Generate sitemap and robots.txt
Body: Create sitemap and robots for prototype and eventual production use.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: sitemap includes all routes; robots does not block crawlers unless intentionally configured.

Title: Create llms.txt
Body: Create AI-readable description of CHS, services, core pages, and safety constraints.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: /llms.txt published and linked in proposal.

Title: Create pricing.md
Body: Create structured pricing explainer with quote-based pricing and factors, no unsupported exact pricing.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: /pricing.md published.

Title: Create AGENTS.md
Body: Create AI-agent interaction and safety guide for site content/support usage.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: /AGENTS.md published.

Title: Set up HubSpot account
Body: Create new HubSpot account and configure base users.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: Dinesh, Milan, technician access configured.

Title: Configure HubSpot contacts/companies/deals/tickets
Body: Create schema and pipelines for CRM and support operations.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: fields/pipelines/ticket categories match proposal.

Title: Connect Gmail logging to HubSpot
Body: Enable email logging/tracking for Dinesh, Milan, and technician.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: test emails log to contact/company timeline.

Title: Create HubSpot import templates
Body: Prepare CSV templates for contacts, companies, machines, deals, support history.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: templates include required fields and validation notes.

Title: Import initial contacts and companies
Body: Import clean initial dataset.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: sample records validated by Milan/Dinesh.

Title: Create machine record strategy
Body: Decide whether machine records live in HubSpot properties, Google Sheet, or synced external table.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: documented decision and first records linked.

Title: Build Cloudflare Worker for SMS webhook
Body: Receive Twilio SMS webhook and perform routing/classification.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: inbound test SMS creates/updates ticket and sends safe response.

Title: Add HubSpot lookup to SMS Worker
Body: Match inbound phone number to HubSpot contact/company.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: known customer lookup works; unknown path asks for identity.

Title: Implement SMS PHI warning
Body: Send first-response warning not to share protected health information.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: first thread response includes PHI warning and bot disclosure.

Title: Implement SMS classification logic
Body: Classify support, onboarding, technical question, sales, scheduling, PHI-risk, urgency/frustration.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: classification stored on ticket and reviewable.

Title: Create HubSpot ticket from SMS
Body: Create or update ticket with message content, classification, customer, and priority.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: ticket contains transcript and relevant metadata.

Title: Notify technician by SMS/email
Body: Send technician SMS/email notification for support tickets.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: test ticket notifies technician with summary and link.

Title: Notify Dinesh on urgent/escalated issues
Body: Add escalation notification for urgent, frustrated, sales-sensitive, or PHI-risk cases.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: P0/P1 tickets trigger Dinesh notification.

Title: Implement SMS scheduling flow
Body: Offer Google Calendar support windows via SMS.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: customer can receive/select support windows; event created.

Title: Set up Google Calendar support calendar
Body: Create CHS Support Windows calendar with 8am–6pm PT availability.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: calendar exists with default support windows and event templates.

Title: Build AssemblyAI/Twilio voice agent backend
Body: Create voice agent using Twilio Media Streams and AssemblyAI realtime transcription.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: inbound call is answered, transcribed, classified, and summarized.

Title: Implement voice intent routing
Body: Route new sales calls quickly, support calls to ticketing/intake, urgent calls to transfer.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: test calls follow routing matrix.

Title: Implement live transfer logic
Body: Transfer appropriate calls to Dinesh or technician.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: transfer works with fallback if unavailable.

Title: Add call recording disclosure and storage plan
Body: Add recording disclosure and decide where summaries/recordings are stored.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: disclosure played; transcript/summary saved to HubSpot.

Title: Create voice fallback handling
Body: Fallback to callback ticket or voicemail-like flow when AI/transfer fails.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: system fails safely and notifies internal team.

Title: Build Trigger.dev workflow for daily owner digest
Body: Send daily summary of leads, follow-ups, tickets, and escalations.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: daily digest generated from HubSpot data.

Title: Build renewal/replacement workflow
Body: Flag customers around approximate 5-year replacement window.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: contacts/companies get tasks and draft follow-up suggestions.

Title: Build quote follow-up workflow
Body: Create follow-up tasks after quotes and no-response windows.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: overdue quote tasks appear in dashboard.

Title: Build conference follow-up workflow
Body: Automate post-conference source tagging and follow-up task/email drafts.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: conference leads receive appropriate tasks and draft messages.

Title: Create support knowledge base content model
Body: Define public/gated support content and retrieval format for support bot.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: content types and metadata defined.

Title: Add analytics
Body: Add GA4/PostHog or lightweight analytics to prototype.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: page views and CTA clicks tracked.

Title: Add form event tracking
Body: Track consultation, SMS click, phone click, conference form, article CTA events.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: events visible in analytics dashboard.

Title: QA accessibility and responsive layout
Body: Test mobile/desktop and accessibility basics.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: no major layout breaks; keyboard/semantic structure acceptable.

Title: QA support bot safety cases
Body: Test PHI, pricing, warranty, medical advice, angry customer, unknown contact scenarios.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: all safety cases route correctly.

Title: Write implementation handoff docs
Body: Create documentation for Milan to maintain system with light support.
Acceptance Criteria: Acceptance: docs include architecture, env vars, common fixes, workflows.
